mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO AS userNo, TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount FROM TBL_CURRENCY WHERE USER_NO = #{value}
SELECT USER_NO AS userNo, LOG_DATE AS logDate, LOG_REASON AS logReason, CHANGE_AMOUNT AS changeAmount FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_NO = #{value} ORDER BY LOG_DATE DESC, LOG_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CURRENCY (CURRENCY_ID, USER_NO, TOTAL_AMOUNT) VALUES (1, #{userNo}, #{changeAmount}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE TOTAL_AMOUNT = TOTAL_AMOUNT + #{changeAmount}
INSERT INTO TBL_LOG_POINT ( USER_NO, CURRENCY_ID, CHANGE_AMOUNT, LOG_REASON, LOG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, 1, #{changeAmount}, #{logReason}, NOW() )
